title: Refactor: Remove deprecated utility functions
original_text: Removed deprecated utility functions that were marked for removal in the previous release. Deleted old_format_date(), legacy_parse(), and deprecated_helper() from utils/. Updated all call sites to use the new replacement functions. Updated documentation to reflect the removal. Added deprecation warnings in the previous release, so this is a breaking change as planned. Result: 45 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Update call sites to use replacement functions
- Execute planned breaking change from previous release
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(utils): remove deprecated utility functions"
